title: Hamster's Delight
description: You eat hamsters? How pathetic... but I like it!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff3ca6b6ee54249da84f4e329fd4e3ce2c3b357c.png)

~~**This mod is a part of the "Resurrection" modpack. It serves as an extension for both "Farmer's Delight" and "Hamsters,"**~~

**Discontinued**

## Description
Adding a variety of hamster-related dishes to your game. Enjoy your furry feast!

## Q&A
Q:Can I use this mod into my modpack?

A:Sure, make sure to credit, and don't claim Hamster's Delight as your own creation。
